desc: Three novellas of loyalty and leadership: Redtail's Debt, Tawnypelt's Clan, and Shadowstar's Life.
descZh: 三个关于忠诚与领导力的短篇：红尾的恩债、褐皮的族群、影星的生命。

q.en: In Redtail's Debt, as an apprentice whose life did Tigerclaw save, creating a lifelong debt?
q.zh: 在《红尾的恩债》中，作为学徒时，虎掌（Tigerclaw）救了谁，从而让对方记了一辈子恩情？

options.en: Whitestorm according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 白风暴（Whitestorm）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Tigerclaw saves Redpaw's life when they are young apprentices, and Redtail feels he owes Tigerclaw a debt forever after.
explain.zh: 虎掌在它们还是小学徒时救了红爪一命，红尾从此觉得自己永远欠虎掌一个人情。

q.en: What position does Redtail later hold in ThunderClan?
q.zh: 红尾后来在雷族担任什么职务？

explain.en: Redtail becomes ThunderClan's deputy, even though Tigerclaw also wanted the role.
explain.zh: 红尾成了雷族的副族长，尽管虎掌也想要这个位置。

q.en: In Redtail's Debt, the 'debt' Redtail feels makes him...
q.zh: 在《红尾的恩债》中，红尾心里的“恩债”让他……

options.en: Reluctant to oppose Tigerclaw even when he suspects danger
options.zh: 即便察觉虎掌的危险，也不愿反对他

options.en: Become a medicine cat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 成为巫医（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Because he feels indebted, Redtail struggles to stand against Tigerclaw even after he senses Tigerclaw is dangerous.
explain.zh: 因为觉得欠了人情，红尾即便察觉虎掌危险，也很难站出来反对他。

q.en: In Tawnypelt's Clan, which Clan does Tawnypelt belong to?
q.zh: 在《褐皮的族群》中，褐皮（Tawnypelt）属于哪个族群？

explain.en: Tawnypelt is a loyal ShadowClan warrior who raised her kits there.
explain.zh: 褐皮是影族忠心耿耿的武士，她的孩子们也是在影族长大的。

q.en: In Tawnypelt's Clan, what difficult position did Tawnypelt give up for the good of her Clan?
q.zh: 在《褐皮的族群》中，为了族群好，褐皮放弃了什么艰难的职位？

explain.en: The novella explains why Tawnypelt stepped down as ShadowClan's deputy, a hard choice made for her Clan's sake.
explain.zh: 这个短篇讲述了褐皮为何辞去影族副族长——那是她为族群着想而做出的艰难决定。

q.en: Tawnypelt is the sister of which famous ThunderClan leader?
q.zh: 褐皮是哪一位著名雷族族长的姐妹？

options.en: Graystripe according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 灰条（Graystripe）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Tawnypelt and Bramblestar (Brambleclaw) are littermates, both children of Goldenflower.
explain.zh: 褐皮和黑莓星（黑莓爪）是同窝手足，都是金花（Goldenflower）的孩子。

q.en: In Shadowstar's Life, who was Shadowstar?
q.zh: 在《影星的生命》中，影星（Shadowstar）是谁？

explain.en: Shadowstar was the founder and first leader of ShadowClan in the earliest days of the Clans.
explain.zh: 影星是族群黎明时期影族的创立者，也是第一任族长。

q.en: What sad record does Shadowstar hold among Clan leaders?
q.zh: 在历任族长中，影星背负着怎样一项令人唏嘘的纪录？

options.en: She was the first leader to lose her ninth life
options.zh: 她是第一位失去第九条命的族长

options.en: She never received nine lives according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她从未获得九条命（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Shadowstar became the first Clan leader to lose her ninth and final life.
explain.zh: 影星成为第一位失去第九条、也是最后一条命的族长。

q.en: In Shadowstar's Life, in what kind of conflict did Shadowstar lose her last life?
q.zh: 在《影星的生命》中，影星是在怎样的一场冲突里失去最后一条命的？

options.en: A sickness according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一场疾病（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A battle that she herself started
options.zh: 一场由她自己挑起的战斗

explain.en: Shadowstar fell in a battle of her own making, losing her final life.
explain.zh: 影星在自己挑起的战斗中倒下，失去了最后一条命。

q.en: Shadowstar's story takes place in which time period of Clan history?
q.zh: 影星的故事发生在族群历史的哪个时期？

options.en: The early days of the Clans (Dawn of the Clans)
During the original series according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 正传故事发生的年代（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Shadowstar's Life is set in the Dawn of the Clans era, when the first Clans were formed.
explain.zh: 《影星的生命》发生在“族群黎明”时代，也就是最初几个族群刚刚成形的时候。
